home.claudeWaiting: Claude is waiting for your response
home.deleteConfirm: Delete everything? Sessions, dossiers, locks — fresh start.

nouveau.title: New dossier
nouveau.description: Describe what you need. The assistant creates the dossier and starts working.
nouveau.placeholder: E.g.: List my desk for sale on Marketplace, price €300...
nouveau.confirmModeHelp: When enabled, the assistant asks you before sending emails, making calls, or taking actions that affect others. Recommended for getting started.
nouveau.exampleSell: List furniture for sale on Marketplace
nouveau.exampleInvoice: Follow up on an unpaid invoice
nouveau.exampleSellFull: List my desk for sale on Facebook Marketplace. Asking price: €300. Describe it as a solid wood desk, good condition, 120x60cm. Use the photos from the folder.
nouveau.exampleInvoiceFull: Follow up on invoice #2025-042 sent to Acme Corp on February 15. Amount: €1,200. Send a polite reminder email with the invoice attached.
nouveau.exampleInsuranceFull: Compare home insurance quotes for a 3-room apartment in Paris, 65m². I want a comparison table with prices, deductibles, and key coverage.
nouveau.exampleDoctorFull: Find a slot with a general practitioner this week, preferably in the morning. Downtown area. Book the appointment if possible.

dossierDetail.dossierCompleted: This dossier is completed. Reopen it to start a session.

instruction.placeholder: Send an instruction to this dossier...

terminal.title: Claude Processes
terminal.outputAtEnd: {{type}} processes display their output at the end of execution.

memory.title: Memory
memory.placeholder: E.g.: Remember that my accountant is Mr. Smith, reachable at +1 555 0123
memory.empty: No memory files. Use the field above to create one.

onboarding.welcomeDescription: Your personal admin assistant. It handles your tasks in the background and only notifies you when it needs you.
onboarding.pillarTasksDescription: Describe what needs to be done, the assistant handles it.
onboarding.pillarAutoDescription: Claude works on its own in the background.
onboarding.pillarControlDescription: You stay in charge. Review, modify, or take over anytime.
onboarding.emptyWaitingUser: When the assistant needs your input, tasks will appear here.
onboarding.emptyWaitingTiers: Tasks waiting for a third party (email reply, callback...) will show up here.
onboarding.emptySuggestions: The assistant monitors your emails and messages. New tasks it detects will appear here.
onboarding.emptyDossiers: Your active tasks will appear here.
onboarding.postCreationBanner: The assistant is working on your task. You can follow its progress here. It will notify you via Telegram when it needs you.
onboarding.navLockedAmeliorations: Appears after a few days of use

toolbox.title: Agent Toolbox
toolbox.marketplaceDescription: Browse the official MCP registry to extend your agent
toolbox.communityWarning: Community servers are not verified by OpenTidy. Review the source code before installing.
toolbox.searchPlaceholder: Search MCP servers... (notion, slack, github, stripe...)
toolbox.agentsDescription: Choose which AI CLI runs your sessions
toolbox.resetDesc: Delete all dossiers, sessions, suggestions, gaps, and memory. This cannot be undone.
toolbox.resetConfirm: Are you sure? This will delete ALL data (dossiers, sessions, memory). This cannot be undone.

helpTooltip.dossier: An administrative task that the assistant manages for you, from start to finish.
helpTooltip.waitingUser: The assistant is stuck and needs your response to continue.
helpTooltip.suggestion: A task automatically detected in your emails or messages.
helpTooltip.amelioration: Something the assistant identified to serve you better in the future.
